title: React Task List Component from ADSP

project.description: Project to add task list component in.
project.x-prompt: Which project to add task list component for?

env.description: ADSP environment / access service to target: test = access-uat.alberta.ca (UAT — use for dev and pre-prod), prod = access.alberta.ca, dev = ADSP platform dev (restricted). Defaults to test.

accessToken.description: Access token for retrieving configuration from ADSP APIs.
